## LinkedIn (Long-form)

### Announcement Post

**Workforce navigation for every Missouri county**

I'm excited to share Access To Jobs — a free, open-source AI tool for workforce development staff, job seekers, and career counselors.

Here's the problem: WIOA navigation, job matching across 114 Missouri counties. But navigating this space is complex, and most people don't have a specialist by their side.

Access To Jobs changes that. It's a Claude Skill — upload one file to Claude, and it becomes your jobs expert. No code, no cost.

What you can do:
1. Match a job seeker to WIOA-eligible training programs in their county
2. Navigate On-the-Job Training funding requirements
3. Build a career pathway from assessment to placement

It's part of the Access To ecosystem — 6 pillars, 7 projects, all open source.

Try it: github.com/dougdevitre/access-to-jobs
Learn more: https://dougdevitre.org

#AccessTo #CivicTech #AI #OpenSource #Jobs
